description_long: This is a medium-sized pumpkin with a smooth, rounded body and a pale orange hue. The front face features a jagged, geometric carving resembling a stylized face with sharp, angular eyes and a wide, toothy mouth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The interior of the pumpkin is hollow, visible through the carved openings, and the cut edges reveal a slightly lighter inner flesh. At the top, a short, thick, pale green stem is present, adding to its natural look. The surface is mostly matte with subtle ridges running vertically from the stem to the base. There are no additional decorations or accessories attached to the pumpkin.
description: A pale orange pumpkin with a carved, jagged face and a short green stem, resembling a classic jack-o'-lantern. The surface is smooth with visible ridges and a hollow interior.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved face with sharp, angular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, as well as the hollow interior.
description_view_1: The rear view displays the smooth, uncarved surface of the pumpkin and the stem, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: The left side view highlights the rounded, ribbed body and the stem, with no carvings visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the pumpkin's smooth surface and a partial glimpse of the carved opening at the front.
attribute_carving_pattern: The carving pattern is geometric and stylized, featuring sharp, angular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth, typical of a traditional jack-o'-lantern face. The cutouts are bold and symmetrical, with no additional motifs or etchings.
